# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

interface ModuleConfig {
  path: string;
  name: string;
}

interface LoadedModule {
  name: string;
  module: any;
  execute?: (req: Request, context: any) => Promise<Response>;
}

const moduleCache = new Map<string, LoadedModule>();

function parseModuleConfig(configString: string): ModuleConfig[] {
  try {
    return JSON.parse(configString);
  } catch {
    return configString.split(",").map((path, index) => ({
      path: path.trim(),
      name: `module_${index}`,
    }));
  }
}

async function loadModule(config: ModuleConfig): Promise<LoadedModule> {
  const cacheKey = `${config.name}:${config.path}`;

  if (moduleCache.has(cacheKey)) {
    return moduleCache.get(cacheKey)!;
  }

  try {
    const module = await import(config.path);
    const loaded: LoadedModule = {
      name: config.name,
      module,
      execute: module.default || module.handler || module.execute,
    };

    moduleCache.set(cacheKey, loaded);
    return loaded;
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error(
      `Failed to load module ${config.name} from ${config.path}: ${error.message}`
    );
  }
}

async function loadModulesFromConfig(configs: ModuleConfig[]): Promise<LoadedModule[]> {
  const results = await Promise.allSettled(
    configs.map((config) => loadModule(config))
  );

  const loaded: LoadedModule[] = [];
  const errors: string[] = [];

  results.forEach((result, index) => {
    if (result.status === "fulfilled") {
      loaded.push(result.value);
    } else {
      errors.push(`Module ${configs[index].name}: ${result.reason}`);
    }
  });

  if (errors.length > 0 && loaded.length === 0) {
    throw new Error(`All modules failed to load:\n${errors.join("\n")}`);
  }

  return loaded;
}

function getModuleConfigsFromEnv(): ModuleConfig[] {
  const envModules = Deno.env.get("MODULES");
  if (!envModules) {
    return [];
  }
  return parseModuleConfig(envModules);
}

function getModuleConfigsFromQuery(url: URL): ModuleConfig[] {
  const modules = url.searchParams.get("modules");
  const moduleName = url.searchParams.get("module_name");
  const modulePath = url.searchParams.get("module_path");

  if (modules) {
    return parseModuleConfig(modules);
  }

  if (modulePath) {
    return [
      {
        path: modulePath,
        name: moduleName || "query_module",
      },
    ];
  }

  return [];
}

async function executeModules(
  modules: LoadedModule[],
  req: Request,
  context: any
): Promise<Response> {
  for (const mod of modules) {
    if (mod.execute && typeof mod.execute === "function") {
      const result = await mod.execute(req, context);
      if (result instanceof Response) {
        return result;
      }
    }
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      message: "Modules loaded but no handler returned a response",
      loaded: modules.map((m) => m.name),
    }),
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    }
  );
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ status: "ok" }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/clear-cache") {
    moduleCache.clear();
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ message: "Cache cleared" }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  try {
    const envConfigs = getModuleConfigsFromEnv();
    const queryConfigs = getModuleConfigsFromQuery(url);

    const allConfigs = [...envConfigs, ...queryConfigs];

    if (allConfigs.length === 0) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: "No modules specified",
          usage: {
            env: "Set MODULES environment variable",
            query: "Use ?module_path=URL or ?modules=JSON",
          },
        }),
        {
          status: 400,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    const loadedModules = await loadModulesFromConfig(allConfigs);

    const context = {
      url,
      method: req.method,
      headers: Object.fromEntries(req.headers.entries()),
      loadedModules: loadedModules.map((m) => m.name),
    };

    return await executeModules(loadedModules, req, context);
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: error.message,
        stack: error.stack,
      }),
      {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      }
    );
  }
}

serve(handler);
